title: Hiring Store Manager at Dulux Decorator Centre

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Dulux Decorator Centre
jsonLd.description:
We at Dulux Decorator Centre are looking for an experienced Store Manager based out of Pimpri-Chinchwad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Dulux Decorator Centre:
Dulux Decorator Centre is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dulux Decorator Centre!
jsonLd.skills: Supply Chain, Customer Service, SAP Retail, E-commerce Integration, Retail Analytics, Planogram, MS Excel, Team Leadership
